description: Question submitted to "sayyidnā," it seems the Head of the Karaite community, about a case that had come before the governor/chief of police (wālī) of Alexandria. One of the writer's opponents was Ibn al-Laḥḥām, who had been under a ban of excommunication for 25 years for having a child with a woman lacking kashrut (according to Karaite law). The son is now a member of the community. Information from Goitein's index card. Might be same handwriting as T-S AS 146.319 (PGPID 17396).
description_he: שאלה המוגשת ל'סיידנא', כנראה ראש קהילת הקראים, על מקרה שהגיע לפני ממונה אלכסנדריה. אחד מהמתנגדים לכותב הוא אבן אל-לחאם, שהיה בחרם 25 שנה בשל יחסיו עם אישה ללא כשרות (לפי חוק קראי)
